Purchase Price and Funding: $80,000,000 wired to Issuer DDA 8394726154 at Outlook Ridge Bank, ABA 000000000, by 30-Sep-2026; Closing costs capped at $750,000.

Ms. Lila Sandoval, Managing Director, l.sandoval@meridianharbor.example, +1-212-555-0149.
Company contact: Mr. Darren Cole, CFO, d.cole@northbridgevitalcare.example, +1-415-555-0136.
Security: Series C Convertible Preferred Stock (non-voting until conversion), initial conversion price $7.50; intended listing of underlying common on Mid-Atlantic Stock Exchange (symbol NBVC).
Purchase Price and Funding: $80,000,000 wired to Issuer DDA 8394726154 at Outlook Ridge Bank, ABA 000000000, by 30-Sep-2026; Closing costs capped at $750,000.

Management Matters: retention bonuses for up to 12 key employees; no individual employee SSNs will be requested at signing (Form Field: [Insert SSN] is not to be completed).
Representations: standard Rule 10b-5, no undisclosed liabilities exceeding $2m, and compliance with banking customer data safeguards (GLBA) for any shared account metadata.
Conditions Precedent: board approval; KYC/CIP including a copy of Mr. Darren Cole’s U.S. Passport No. 712345674
